title: Rest Baked Mediterranean Chicken
description: A flavorful and healthy chicken dish, baked in a Mediterranean-inspired sauce, with rest on top.
instructions: 2. In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, and oregano.
3. Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
4. Place the chicken in a baking dish and brush the Mediterranean sauce all over it.
5. Sprinkle the chopped rest on top of the chicken.
6. Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes.
7. Remove the chicken from the oven and top with crumbled feta cheese.
8. Return the chicken to the oven and bake for an additional 5-10 minutes.
9. Remove the chicken from the oven and let it rest for 5-10 minutes before slicing and serving.
